evidence.detail: Calculated engagement rate of 0.98% (355+100/22643 on most recent post) falls within expected range for micro-tier influencer (10-50K followers: 1.5-3%)
fakeInfluencerScore of 0.0 indicates no detected fake influencer patterns
humanScore of 0.91 confirms real person operates the account
Following 3,695 accounts while having 22,643 followers (ratio 6.1) is reasonable for an active content creator
1,705 posts over account lifetime shows consistent posting history with authentic surf/lifestyle content theme
Recent posts show varied engagement (42-621 likes, 3-116 comments) indicating organic audience interaction patterns
Active presence across Instagram, YouTube (3,710 subscribers), and Facebook (6,078 followers) with consistent branding
Comment counts range from 3-116 per post, suggesting genuine audience engagement rather than inflated metrics
